ACUTE - Enum constant in enum class com.shapeville.model.AngleType
Angle greater than 0 and less than 90 degrees.
Angle - Class in com.shapeville.model
Represents an angle with its degree value and determined angle type.

Constructs a new Angle object.
ANGLE_TYPE_PANEL_ID - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Angle type identification task panel ID.
ANGLES_PER_IDENTIFICATION_QUIZ - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Number of angles presented in an angle identification quiz.
AngleType - Enum Class in com.shapeville.model
Enumerates the different types of angles for the angle recognition task.
AREA_CALC_PANEL_ID - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Area calculation task panel ID.

C

calculatePoints(int, boolean) - Method in class com.shapeville.logic.ScoreManager
Calculates points earned for a task based on the number of attempts used and task type.

COMPOUND_AREA_PANEL_ID - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Compound area calculation task panel ID.
Constants - Class in com.shapeville.utils
Utility class containing constant values used throughout the Shapeville application.
currentTaskInterrupted() - Method in class com.shapeville.logic.TaskManager
Handles the interruption of the current task (e.g., user navigates away).
currentTaskTypeCompleted(TaskLogic) - Method in class com.shapeville.logic.TaskManager
Called when a task type (a set of questions within a panel) is completed by the user.

DEFAULT_MAX_ATTEMPTS - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Default maximum number of attempts allowed for a problem.

Determines the type of an angle based on its degree measurement.

The EndPanel class represents the screen displayed at the end of a user session.

endSession() - Method in class com.shapeville.main.MainFrame

Gets the correct answer to display to the user.

Gets the determined type of the angle.

Gets the current total score of the user in the session.

Gets the user-friendly display name of the angle type.
getImagePath() - Method in class com.shapeville.model.Shape
Gets the relative path to the shape's image file.
getMessage() - Method in class com.shapeville.model.Feedback
Gets the textual feedback message.

Gets the identifier of the task this problem belongs to.

Gets the count of distinct task types completed in the current session.
getTaskType() - Method in class com.shapeville.model.TaskDefinition
Gets the type identifier for the task.
getType() - Method in class com.shapeville.model.Shape

Utility class for loading and scaling images from resources.

Increments the count of completed task types within the current session.
isAdvancedScoring() - Method in class com.shapeville.model.TaskDefinition
Checks if the task uses advanced scoring.
isCorrect() - Method in class com.shapeville.model.Feedback
Checks if the user's answer was correct.
isTaskTypeComplete() - Method in class com.shapeville.model.Feedback
Checks if this feedback signifies the completion of the entire task type.

Loads an image from the application's resources and scales it to the specified dimensions.

The main method to start the Shapeville application.

Main entry point for the Shapeville v3 application.

The main application window (JFrame) for Shapeville v3.

registerPanel(String, JPanel) - Method in class com.shapeville.main.MainFrame
Registers a panel (like a task screen or home screen) with the CardLayout.
resetCurrentTask() - Method in class com.shapeville.logic.TaskManager
Resets the current task state.
resetSession() - Method in class com.shapeville.logic.ScoreManager
Resets the current score and the completed task type count to zero.

S

SCORE_ADVANCED - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Scoring level: Advanced.
SCORE_BASIC - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Scoring level: Basic.
ScoreManager - Class in com.shapeville.logic
Manages the user's score and progress within the Shapeville application session.
ScoreManager() - Constructor for class com.shapeville.logic.ScoreManager
Constructs a new ScoreManager and resets the session score and task count.

Bonus 2: Sector Area Calculation Allows users to choose a sector and calculate its area.

Sets the content panel.
setNavigationBar(NavigationBar) - Method in class com.shapeville.logic.ScoreManager
Sets the NavigationBar instance to allow updating the UI with score changes.

Represents a geometric shape with its name, image path, and type.

Constructs a new Shape object.

Shape identification task panel ID.
SHAPES_PER_IDENTIFICATION_QUIZ - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Number of shapes presented in a shape identification quiz.
shouldProceedToNextProblem() - Method in class com.shapeville.model.Feedback
Checks if the task should proceed to the next problem after this feedback.
showFeedback(Feedback) - Method in class com.shapeville.task.sk1.Task1Panel2D
 
showFeedback(Feedback) - Method in class com.shapeville.task.sk1.Task1Panel3D

showFeedback(Feedback) - Method in class com.shapeville.task.sk2.Task4Panel
 
showFeedback(Feedback) - Method in interface com.shapeville.ui.panel_templates.TaskPanel
Displays feedback to the user based on their answer.
showPanel(String) - Method in class com.shapeville.main.MainFrame
Switches the currently displayed panel in the CardLayout to the one identified by the given panel ID.
startFullSessionSequence() - Method in class com.shapeville.logic.TaskManager
Starts a new full session, resetting the score and beginning the task sequence defined by sessionTaskSequenceIds.
startSpecificTask(String) - Method in class com.shapeville.logic.TaskManager
Starts a specific task identified by its ID, bypassing the default session sequence.
STRAIGHT - Enum constant in enum class com.shapeville.model.AngleType
Angle exactly 180 degrees.

T

TASK_ID_ANGLE_TYPE - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants

TASK_ID_AREA_CALC - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Task ID for area calculation.
TASK_ID_CIRCLE_CALC - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Task ID for circle calculation.
TASK_ID_COMPOUND_AREA_CALC - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Task ID for compound area calculation.
TASK_ID_SECTOR_CIRCLE_CALC - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Task ID for sector and circle calculation.
TASK_ID_SHAPE_ID_2D - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Task ID for 2D shape identification.
TASK_ID_SHAPE_ID_3D - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Task ID for 3D shape identification.
TASK_TIME_LIMIT_SEC - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
The default time limit for timed tasks in seconds.
TASK_TYPE_ANGLE_IDENTIFICATION - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Task type for angle identification.
TASK_TYPE_AREA_CALC - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Task type for area calculation.
TASK_TYPE_CIRCLE_CALC - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Task type for circle calculation.
TASK_TYPE_COMPOUND_AREA_CALC - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Task type for compound area calculation.
TASK_TYPE_SECTOR_CIRCLE_CALC - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Task type for sector and circle calculation.
TASK_TYPE_SHAPE_IDENTIFICATION_2D - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants
Task type for 2D shape identification.
TASK_TYPE_SHAPE_IDENTIFICATION_3D - Static variable in class com.shapeville.utils.Constants

Defines the metadata for a specific task within the Shapeville application.

Constructs a new TaskDefinition.

A placeholder interface for defining the logic required by various tasks.

Manages the sequence and logic flow of different tasks within the Shapeville application.

Constructs a new TaskManager.
TaskPanel - Interface in com.shapeville.ui.panel_templates
Interface defining the contract for all Task UI Panels in the Shapeville application.

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.shapeville.model.AngleType
